focusPoints.label: Celebrating the success of the payments refactor
focusPoints.reason: Just shipped the payments refactor on Monday — big win, team noticed. Worth ensuring Priya feels recognized for this achievement.

focusPoints.label: Checking in on energy and motivation
focusPoints.reason: Looks a bit flat this week, quieter than usual in standup. Could be post-launch fatigue, a personal matter, or just a quiet week — worth checking in.

focusPoints.label: Exploring mentoring opportunities
focusPoints.reason: Mentioned in passing they'd like to do more mentoring; we haven't talked about that in a few months. Could be a growth area Priya wants to pursue.

focusPoints.label: Discussing upcoming involvement in the billing rewrite
focusPoints.reason: Next quarter they'll probably be pulled into the billing rewrite, which they haven't heard about yet. Worth discussing to align on upcoming priorities.

focusPoints.label: What support they need from you right now
focusPoints.reason: No specific signal — selected because this is a normal Bi-weekly check-in topic for a Senior Backend Engineer.

name: Priya
